title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Cisco India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Cisco India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Cisco India South Asia Partners in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cisco India South Asia Partners:
Cisco India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cisco India South Asia Partners!
